title: Physical system nodes
description: Schema for shared/physical_system_nodes.csv. Physical system nodes are grouping and navigation metadata only. They MUST NOT define coverage obligations, residual semantics, or any first-class ontology that competes with shared/roles.csv. Roles are the authoritative coverage objects; this file exists only to host genuinely non-role grouping nodes (such as broad navigation clusters). Nodes that exist only as 1:1 wrappers around a role must be removed rather than retained here. The file may be renamed in a later cleanup to reflect this narrower navigation purpose.

description.description: Plain-language description of the grouping or navigation node.

parent_node_id.description: Parent grouping node identifier. Blank only for the root node.

node_kind.description: Navigation node class. Only the navigation root and grouping clusters are allowed: role-anchor, residual-anchor, intermediate-anchor and export-anchor wrappers are not part of the canonical ontology. Any node that mirrors a role 1:1 must be removed rather than represented here, and residual placeholder semantics live at the representation layer through representation_kind = residual_stub.

boundary.description: Grouping boundary represented by the navigation cluster.

display_order.description: Stable ordering for navigation and documentation.
